raw_payload.name: SUITE ROOM
raw_payload.roomDescription: Located on floors 1 to 10, this suite features a king-size bed, large living area with sofa and coffee table, a workspace, safe, iron and ironing board, and complimentary Wi-Fi.  The bathroom includes a bathtub, shower, bidet, and toilet.

raw_payload.name: SUITE
raw_payload.roomDescription: Located on floors 1 to 10, this suite features a king-size bed, large living area with sofa and coffee table, a workspace, safe, iron and ironing board, and complimentary Wi-Fi.  The bathroom includes a bathtub, shower, bidet, and toilet.

raw_payload.name: ROOM, TRIPLE
raw_payload.roomDescription: This suite features a double bed, a single bed, two armchairs, a coffee table, and a workspace.  Amenities include a bathroom with a bidet, separate shower and bathtub, complimentary Wi-Fi, TV, a safe, and bedside controls for air conditioning, a wake-up alarm, and a do-not-disturb indicator. A minibar is available upon request.
